title: Long coding task: plugin discovery, schema validation, and diagnostics
instruction: The plugin registry has multiple regressions after a schema change. Inspect the README, plugin fixtures, source, and failing tests. Fix plugin discovery, schema validation, and diagnostic reporting without changing public function names. Run npm test and leave repair-notes.md with the three root causes and the verification command. This task benefits from independent review or subagent triage when available.
notes: Long coding task with multiple root causes and a hidden notes checker.
